title: Functional Constructs
source_outline: Lambda (anonymous) functions: syntax and use as a sort key
Decorators (light introduction): the @decorator syntax; a @timer example
Generators: the yield keyword; lazy evaluation (concept)

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: generator pause/resume flow: calling fibonacci() creates a paused generator object; each next() call resumes execution until the next yield, handing back progressive values (0, 1, 1, 2, 3...) while local state (a, b) persists across pauses.

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
